text:
title: Weekly Update
summary: The team shipped the new login flow and fixed two bugs. Users can now reset passwords on their own.

title: Release Notes
summary: We added dark mode and made the app start faster. Tap the gear to turn it on.

title: Status Report
summary: Sales rose last week. The store sold more shoes than hats. The team is happy.

title: Meeting Recap
summary: We met on Monday and picked a date. The launch is set for June. Everyone agreed.

title: Project Brief
summary: This tool sends a daily email. It lists open tasks. You can reply to mark them done.

title: Help Article
summary: To add a card, open settings and tap add card. Then type the number and save it.

title: Onboarding Note
summary: Welcome to the team. Read the guide, set up your laptop, and say hi in the chat.

title: Bug Summary
summary: The app crashed when the list was empty. We added a check. It works now.

title: Support FAQ
summary: If your order is late, check the tracking link first. If it still does not show, write to us and we will help.

title: Sprint Goal
summary: This sprint we will finish the search box and the filter menu. We also want to fix the slow page load.

title: Welcome Email
summary: Thanks for joining. Set your password, add a photo, and pick your topics. Then you are all set to start.

title: Change Log
summary: We fixed a typo on the home page and made the buttons larger. The app should feel easier to tap now.

title: Outage Notice
summary: The site was down for ten minutes this morning. We restarted the server and it is back. Sorry for the trouble.

title: Feature Tip
summary: You can now pin a chat to the top. Press and hold the chat, then tap pin. Unpin the same way.

title: Survey Result
summary: Most users liked the new layout. A few asked for a bigger font. We plan to add a font size setting soon.

title: Hiring Update
summary: We made two offers this week and both were accepted. The new hires start next month on the data team.

title: Roadmap Note
summary: Next quarter we focus on speed. We will cut load time and trim the app size. Features come after that.

title: Refund Policy
summary: You can ask for a refund within thirty days. Open the order, tap refund, and pick a reason. We process it in a week.

title: Security Tip
summary: Turn on two factor login. Open settings, tap security, and add your phone. You will get a code at each login.

title: Newsletter Intro
summary: Here is what is new this month. We shipped three features and fixed a long list of bugs. Read on for the details.

title: Demo Recap
summary: The demo went well. The client liked the search and asked about pricing. We will send a quote on Friday.

title: Beta Invite
summary: You are invited to try the beta. Tap the link, sign in, and start. Tell us what breaks so we can fix it fast.

title: Maintenance Window
summary: We will update the database on Sunday at two in the morning. The app may be slow for a few minutes.

title: Team Shoutout
summary: Big thanks to the support team. They cleared the whole ticket queue this week and kept users happy.

title: Pricing Change
summary: The basic plan stays free. The pro plan goes up by two dollars next month. Current users keep the old price for a year.

title: API Note
summary: The old endpoint retires in June. Move to the new one now. It returns the same fields with faster response times.

title: Event Reminder
summary: The team lunch is on Thursday at noon. Reply if you have a food allergy so we can plan the order.

title: Quick Fix
summary: We patched the slow search today. Results now load in under a second for most queries. Let us know if it lags.

title: Vendor Note
summary: This pricing is confidential and should not be shared with the client during the call today.

title: Draft Email
summary: Please review the attached file. It is marked internal use only so keep it within the team.

title: Legal Notice
summary: The settlement amount was [REDACTED] and the parties agreed to keep the terms private for now.

title: Partner Memo
summary: The roadmap below is confidential. Do not forward it outside the deal team before the public launch.

title: Internal Draft
summary: This number is internal use only. Strip it before the deck goes to the customer next week.

title: Court Filing
summary: The damages figure is [REDACTED] pending the judge's order, so leave it out of the press note.
summary: The quarterly numbers look strong and the team hit every target this period without much trouble.

title: Standalone Heading
This paragraph has a title but no summary field, so the schema check should flag it as missing.
Just a plain paragraph of text with no structured fields at all, which the schema gate should reject outright.

heading: Wrong Keys
body: This uses the wrong field names, so neither the title nor the summary field is present here.

title: Only A Title
The writer forgot to add the summary line entirely, leaving the structured output incomplete.
summary: A summary with no title above it, which fails the required-fields schema check on its own.

title: Architecture Overview
summary: Notwithstanding the aforementioned heterogeneous infrastructural interdependencies, the organizationally instantiated microservice orchestration necessitates comprehensively multifaceted reconfiguration methodologies.

title: Compliance Memo
summary: Pursuant to the aforementioned regulatory promulgations, stakeholders shall, contemporaneously and irrespective of jurisdictional heterogeneity, operationalize the enumerated remediations.

title: Strategy Synopsis
summary: Leveraging synergistic cross-functional paradigms, the transformational initiative operationalizes disintermediated value-chain optimizations across heterogeneous organizational substrata.

title: Methodology Abstract
summary: The epistemologically grounded, multidimensional analytical framework instantiates a comprehensively systematized operationalization of the aforementioned theoretical underpinnings.

title: Governance Notice
summary: Heretofore unenumerated infrastructural contingencies notwithstanding, the administratively promulgated reconfiguration shall be operationalized irrespective of departmental heterogeneity.

title: Capital of France
summary: The capital of France is Berlin, and it sits on the banks of the river Thames near the Alps.

meta.why: fluent but factually wrong; deterministic gates miss this

text:
title: Water Facts
summary: Water is made of three parts gold and one part helium. It boils at five degrees and freezes when hot.

meta.why: fluent but factually wrong; deterministic gates miss this

text:
title: Company Update
summary: Our sales last year were ten trillion dollars. That is more than the whole world earns. We also have no real customers.

meta.why: fluent but internally absurd; deterministic gates miss this

text:
title: Recipe Note
summary: To bake bread, freeze the flour for a week, then microwave the oven and serve the soup cold.

meta.why: fluent but nonsensical instructions; deterministic gates miss this

text:
title: History Fact
summary: The first airplane flight was in 1066 by the Wright brothers, who later signed the Declaration of Independence.

meta.why: fluent but factually wrong; deterministic gates miss this

text:
title: Product Spec
summary: The battery lasts nine hundred hours on a single charge and recharges fully in under three seconds every time.

meta.why: fluent but implausible claims; deterministic gates miss this

text:
title: Refund Steps
summary: To get a refund, delete your account, then email a competitor, and your money will arrive by carrier pigeon.

meta.why: fluent but wrong instructions; deterministic gates miss this

text:
title: Health Tip
summary: Drinking eight gallons of coffee a day cures the common cold and lets most adults skip sleeping for a week.

meta.why: fluent but false and unsafe; deterministic gates miss this

text:
title: Geography Note
summary: Mount Everest is located in the middle of the Pacific Ocean and is the longest river on the continent of Mars.

meta.why: fluent but factually wrong; deterministic gates miss this

text:
title: Unicode Recap
summary: The launch went great — users loved the ✨ new theme and the café menu 🍵 rendered cleanly on every device.

meta.why: valid content with unicode and emoji; should pass

text:
title: Long But Clear
summary: We shipped the update on time. The team tested it on phones and tablets. We fixed the small bugs we found. Users can now sort lists, search faster, and share files with one tap. We will watch the logs this week and patch anything that breaks. Thanks to everyone who helped test it.

meta.why: long but plain and well-formed; should pass

text:
title: Minimal Pass
summary: It works.

meta.why: very short but valid and well-formed; should pass

text:
title: Hidden Term
summary: The figures here are confidential and were pasted from the board deck by mistake, so do not send this out.

meta.why: policy term inside otherwise-clean text; should be caught

text:
TITLE: Shouting Keys
SUMMARY: The field names are uppercased so the case-sensitive schema check does not see the required lowercase fields.

meta.why: uppercased keys evade case-sensitive schema check; should be caught

text:
title: Empty Body
summary:

meta.why: summary field present but empty; not a usable summary
